name: Crockpot Carmel Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. In the crockpot, combine caramels and water. Cover and cook on high for 1 to 1.5 hours, stirring frequently.
2. Wash and dry apples.
3. Insert a stick into the stem end of each apple.
4. Turn the control to low heat.
5. Dip each apple into hot caramel, turning to coat the entire surface.
6. Holding the apple above the pot, scrape off any excess caramel from the bottom of the apple.
7. Place the apples on greased wax paper to cool.
